Ferdinand Bol

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Aeneas Receiving Armour from Venus
by Ferdinand Bol
Dutch Golden Age · 1660
Venus, nearly naked, hands her son a golden shield and sword for the coming war. Ferdinand Bol was Rembrandt's pupil; you can feel the master's warm shadow on every fold of drapery.
←Greek; Boeotia Niccolo Boldrini→
